title: Lumen — a from-scratch path tracer
description: A physically based Monte-Carlo path tracer built from scratch in TypeScript: a SAH bounding volume hierarchy, GGX microfacet BSDFs with VNDF sampling, smooth and frosted dielectrics, spectral dispersion (prism rainbows), Beer-Lambert volumetric absorption, procedural textures, next-event estimation with multiple importance sampling, adaptive variance-guided sampling with a live noise heatmap, a multi-threaded Web Worker pool, ACES tone mapping, and an edge-avoiding À-Trous denoiser — global illumination on the CPU, in your browser.
